model_output_solution_source:
package main

func run(src, dst []byte, width, height, iters int) uint64 {
	pixels := width * height
	var lastHash uint64
	for iter := 0; iter < iters; iter++ {
		hash := uint64(1469598103934665603)
		for i := 0; i < pixels; i++ {
			base := i * 4
			a := src[base+3]
			na := 255 - a
			r := (uint32(src[base])*uint32(a) + uint32(dst[base])*uint32(na) + 127) / 255
			g := (uint32(src[base+1])*uint32(a) + uint32(dst[base+1])*uint32(na) + 127) / 255
			b := (uint32(src[base+2])*uint32(a) + uint32(dst[base+2])*uint32(na) + 127) / 255

			hash ^= uint64(r)
			hash *= 1099511628211
			hash ^= uint64(g)
			hash *= 1099511628211
			hash ^= uint64(b)
			hash *= 1099511628211
			hash ^= uint64(255) // alpha always 255
			hash *= 1099511628211
		}
		lastHash = hash
	}
	return lastHash
}
